title: 23:08 ГўВЂВ” May 18, 2023
body_text:
23:08 ГўВЂВ” May 18, 2023
File Specification Corrections
Central 1ГўВЂВ™s legacy banking system displayed the USD Month End transaction type as ГўВЂВњ10ГўВЂВќ in the PREC file. The transaction type should have been ГўВЂВњ12ГўВЂВќ. We corrected this error in our documentation as described below.
In addition, we made some corrections to the AFT return file specification documents. These revisions are corrections that were previously missed in the existing file specifications. There are no changes to the AFT Return Clearing Files that Central 1 provides to financial institutions.
Document Library
Number
Details
Transaction and Charge Codes
3667
We changed the USD month-end code in the column headings to ГўВЂВњ12ГўВЂВќ.
PREC File Specifications
3750
In the P record,
Data Element 7 ГўВЂВ“ We updated the Description to clarify that ГўВЂВњ10ГўВЂВќ indicates the CAD month-end charge code, and ГўВЂВњ12ГўВЂВќ indicates the USD month-end charge code.
OREC File Specifications
8951
In the P record,
Data Element 3 ГўВЂВ“ We updated the Description to clarify that ГўВЂВњ10ГўВЂВќ indicates the CAD month-end charge code, and ГўВЂВњ12ГўВЂВќ indicates the USD month-end charge code.
AFT Return Clearing File Specifications ГўВЂВ“ CAD (All Regions Except BC and Atlantic)
9085
In the I and J records,
ГўВЂВў
Data Element 10 ГўВЂВ“ We changed the Description from ГўВЂВњZero FilledГўВЂВќ to ГўВЂВњTransaction type (data element 04) from the original transactionГўВЂВќ.
ГўВЂВў
Data Element 20 ГўВЂВ“ We added ГўВЂВњleft justifiedГўВЂВќ to the Description.
AFT Return Clearing File Specifications ГўВЂВ“ USD (All Regions Except BC and Atlantic)
9086
ГўВЂВў
In Section 3, we corrected the file extension to ГўВЂВњ.DATГўВЂВќ.
ГўВЂВў
In the I and J records, we made the same changes as described above for Form 9085.
